title: Senior Revenue Manager at Cleartrip Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Cleartrip Hotels
jsonLd.description:
Cleartrip Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Vijayawada. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Cleartrip Hotels:
Cleartrip Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Hotels!
